name: R5TypeMapToR4
title: Cross-version ConceptMap for FHIR R5 types in FHIR R4
description: This ConceptMap represents the cross-version mapping of complex types from FHIR R5 for use in FHIR R4.

target.comment:
FHIR R5 `Address` is mapped to  FHIR R4 `Address`.
Using explicit mapping from `http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Address|5.0.0` to `http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Address|4.0.1` in `http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/xver/ConceptMap/types-5to4` (`ConceptMap-types-5to4.json`)
